blocks.photo: A real photograph — shot on a DSLR with a telephoto lens in soft natural daylight, candid documentary wildlife photography, true-to-life skin/fur/surface texture, realistic depth of field and film grain. It must look like an actual photo taken outdoors, NOT an illustration, drawing, render, or artwork.
blocks.photo_found: A real amateur photograph caught by surprise — an ordinary cameraphone or trail-camera snapshot of eyewitness footage: visible sensor grain and high-ISO noise, slightly soft focus with a touch of motion blur, imperfect exposure, harsh direct on-camera flash at night or dim overcast light. It looks like genuine grainy leaked footage of a real living creature, an unremarkable imperfect photo — absolutely NOT a clean render, NOT CGI, NOT a smooth sculpture or statue, NOT crisp, polished, or studio-lit.
blocks.single_subject: Exactly one subject, centered, nothing else in frame.
blocks.isolated: Isolated on a fully transparent background, the entire subject visible and uncropped, with soft naturally feathered edges suitable for dropping into another photograph.
blocks.isolated_overlay: Isolated on a fully transparent background with soft naturally feathered edges, produced as an overlay element to composite into a real photograph.
blocks.photoreal: Photorealistic and believable as a real photograph, even neutral daylight so it can be relit to match any scene, natural (not dramatic) shadows only on the subject itself.
blocks.no_text: No text, no watermark, no caption, no border, no frame, no sticker sheet, no collage.

negative: illustration, drawing, sketch, line art, comic, cartoon, anime, painting, digital painting, concept art, poster, sticker, vector art, cel shaded, 3d render, cgi, octane render, sculpture, statue, figurine, clay, toy, plastic, stylized, cartoonish, text, watermark, logo, caption, border, frame, background, scenery, sky, ground, landscape, buildings, people, multiple subjects, sticker sheet, grid, collage, cropped, cut off, white background, colored background
